title: Unibic Fruit & Nut Cookies 900G, Nuts
description: Discover a delightful snacking experience with Unibic Fruit & Nut Cookies. Each bite is a symphony of rich flavors, combining a medley of cranberries, black currants, almonds, and cashews for a perfect balance of sweetness and crunch. Ideal for any occasion, from casual tea times to special celebrations, these cookies promise a premium treat. Indulge in the goodness of fruits and nuts with every bite, making every moment deliciously memorable.

feature_bullets.value: RICH FLAVOURFUL COOKIES- Unibic Fruit & Nut Cookies offer a premium snacking experience with a rich blend of flavors. Each cookie is packed with delightful fruits and nuts, making every bite a flavorful indulgence.

PACKED WITH DRIED FRUITS & NUTS- These Fruit & Nut Cookies are a delightful blend of exotic fruits and crunchy nuts, including cranberries, black currants, almonds, and cashews. Each bite offers a perfect balance of sweetness and nuttiness, making these cookies a delicious and wholesome treat.

OUR PROMISE- The Fruit & Nut Cookies offer a delightful blend of fruits and nuts, providing a burst of flavor in every bite. Crafted using wire cut technology, giving each cookie a unique texture and consistency. These cookies deliver a premium snacking experience.

PERFECT TEATIME SNACK- Savour the delightful blend of sweetness and crunch with our Fruit & Nut Cookies. Perfectly paired with tea, coffee, or milk, making it a versatile treat for any time of the day. Ideal for on-the-go snacking, making it a convenient and tasty option for busy lifestyles.

SOMETHING FOR EVERY OCCASION- Indulge in the delightful taste of Unibic Fruit & Nut Cookies, perfect for elevating any special occasion, be it a wedding, anniversary, or birthday celebration. Crafted with a rich flavor profile, these cookies blend the goodness of cashews and almonds for a truly delectable experience.

specifications.Occasion: Anniversary, Birthday, Congratulations, New Year, Thank You
